Introduction
    After kidnapping and brutally assaulting two young women, a gang unknowingly finds refuge at a vacation home belonging to the parents of one of the victims: a mother and father who devise an increasingly gruesome series of revenge...

Also known as: La venganza de la casa del lago
Filming locations: Cape Town, Western Cape, South Africa
